jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Abbott India
jsonLd.description:
Abbott India has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Abbott India:
Abbott India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India!
